message: Capability provider contracts and registry hide provider-specific schema and health details behind a narrow interface.
resolution: Adding a provider now requires one manifest-bearing interface and contract validation instead of workflow-kernel changes.

message: index.ts remains larger than the 100-200 line composition-root target because lifecycle orchestration and command formatting are still local.
resolution: Core tools and tool interception have moved to UI adapters; remaining lifecycle and command extraction is tracked as R7 work.

message: Filesystem provider is deep enough to own read/write/delete execution while policy remains centralized in CapabilityBroker and PolicyEngine.
resolution: Smoke test 15 proves the provider cannot write outside the active task scope even when called directly through its invoke method.
